text: As the man tried to swing the speedboat round, the steering wheel came away in his hands.
zh: 当那名男子试图转动快艇方向盘时,方向盘从他手中脱落了。

text: He waved desperately to his companion, who had been water skiing for the last fifteen minutes.
zh: 他拼命地向同伴挥手,那位同伴当时已经滑水滑了十五分钟。

text: Both men had hardly had time to realize what was happening when they were thrown violently into the sea.
zh: 两人几乎还没来得及反应发生了什么,就被猛地甩进了海里。

text: The speedboat had struck a buoy, but it continued to move very quickly across the water.
zh: 快艇撞上了一个浮标,但仍然在水面上飞速前行。

text: Both men had just begun to swim towards the shore,
zh: 两人刚开始朝岸边游去,

text: when they noticed with dismay that the speedboat was moving in a circle.
zh: 就惊恐地发现快艇正在原地绕圈。

text: It now came straight towards them at tremendous speed.
zh: 此刻它正以惊人的速度径直朝他们冲来。

text: In less than a minute, it roared past them only a few feet away.
zh: 不到一分钟,它就从离他们只有几英尺的地方呼啸而过。

text: After it had passed, they swam on as quickly as they could because they knew that the boat would soon return.
zh: 快艇驶过之后,他们尽快继续游动,因为他们知道船很快就会绕回来。

text: They had just had enough time to swim out of danger when the boat again completed a circle.
zh: 他们刚刚有足够的时间游出危险区域,快艇就又转了一圈。

text: On this occasion, however, it had slowed down considerably.
zh: 不过这一次,它的速度已经明显减慢。

text: The petrol had nearly all been used up.
Before long, the noise dropped completely and the boat began to drift gently across the water.
zh: 不久,发动机的轰鸣声完全消失,快艇开始在水面上缓缓漂流。
